creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
I have new installed FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE. Update for harfbuzz to 2.8.1 doesn't build on my system. I had update to Python 3.8 with follow /usr/ports/UPDATING and there are no errors.
